rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §29.0111, which governs special education transition planning timelines for students.
quote: Appropriate state transition planning under the procedure adopted under Section 29.011 must begin for a student not later than when the student reaches 14 years of age.
_note: No relationship between the proposed property tax change and this education transition planning statute.
